name: createMarker
problem_notes: [[setMarkerDrawPriority]] sorts [[allMapMarkers]] from least to most priority. Before {{GVI|arma3|2.18|size= 0.75}} [[createMarker]]/[[createMarkerLocal]] did '''not''' care about drawing priority and added the created marker to the end of the array, making it top priority. Running [[setMarkerDrawPriority]] again sorted this issue.

ret.desc: the marker's name or empty string if the marker name is not unique.

Item.desc: the marker's name, used to reference the marker in scripts.
Item.name: name

Item.desc: In case of an object, the object's model [0,0,0] is used.
Item.name: position

Item.desc: the marker channel - see [[Channel IDs]] (for multiplayer)
Item.name: channel
